## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Command / Config

```bash
lmn run ...
```

```yaml
# lmn.yaml (if applicable)
```

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include full output and exit code.
